title: Roman & Industrial Layers
desc: Discover the UNESCO Antonine Wall frontier and the deep industrial history of the canal and iron foundries.

title: Civic & Cultural Hubs
desc: Explore core landmarks like the Auld Kirk Museum, Town Hall, and William Patrick Library.

title: Community & Fellowship
desc: Connect with local networks, Men's Sheds, support groups, and the active local volunteer infrastructure.

title: Canal & Marina Life
desc: Experience the vibrant leisure activities and historic pathways along the Forth & Clyde Canal corridor.
